title: phyllanthus macrophyllus
intro: Phyllanthus macrophyllus, also known as Phai Jit or Gao-Li-Yu in traditional Chinese medicine, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and China, characterized by its large, elliptical leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Phyllanthus macrophyllus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and enhance immune system response, making it a popular remedy for various health conditions. Phyllanthus macrophyllus is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion for oral consumption, and it can also be formulated into capsules, tablets, or topical creams for specific health benefits.
